subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath inhaled the fragrance of the All-Merciful as it wafteth through all creation, and happy the one who hath quaffed this Kawthar which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نعیما لمن وجد عرف الرحمن اذ سطع فی الامکان و هنیئا لمن شرب هذا الکوثر الذی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
